untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental data indicators (current quarter EPS, prior year quarter EPS, 5-year compounded EPS growth rate, YoY earnings increases) that are NOT available in the allowed technical indicator list. The allowed indicators are purely technical (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, MACD, etc.) and do not include earnings, EPS, or earnings growth metrics. This signal cannot be translated without access to earnings data.
translation_notes: SCHWAGER_DRY_0_1 is a fundamental earnings-based strategy. Entry requires: (1) Current quarter EPS > prior year quarter EPS by ≥35%, (2) Prior 5-year average annual compounded EPS growth ≥20%, (3) At least 2 of last 3 years with YoY earnings increase. Exit requires reversal of these conditions. None of these can be expressed using the available technical indicators.
